description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Python package that runs on push to the master branch and on pull requests to any branch. Use an ubuntu-20.04 job matrix to test with Python 3.6, 3.7, and 3.8. For each Python version, check out the repository, set up Python with pip caching, install dependencies from requirements.txt and dev-requirements.txt, lint with flake8, test documentation build with sphinx, run tests with nosetests, and report coverage to Coveralls.
